---
description: Analyze surviving mutmut mutants and write tests to kill them. Run after `mutmut run` to close test coverage gaps.
argument-hint: [mutant-name-pattern]
---

$ARGUMENTS

Start by running `mutmut results` to get the list of surviving mutants, then work through each one at a time:

1. Run `mutmut show <mutant_name>` to see the exact diff
2. Understand what behavior the mutation changes — what would be different at runtime?
3. Find the right test file for that code
4. Write a focused test that passes on the original code but would fail on the mutant
5. Move to the next mutant

After writing tests, suggest running `mutmut run` again to confirm the mutants are killed.

If a mutant looks equivalent (the mutation cannot change observable behavior), say so and skip it rather than writing a meaningless test.
